name: Warm Asparagus with a Black Pepper Parmesan Z
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Vin Santo or other dry, fragrant wine
3 tbsp sweet butter, softened to room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash asparagus and snap off stem ends with fingers.
2. In a double boiler (large enough to hold asparagus in water portion), combine yolks, egg, and wine with whisk, stirring vigorously until frothy mixture forms.
3. Remove egg mixture from heat and drop asparagus into bottom half of pan. Cook 1 minute and 15 seconds.
4. Meanwhile, whisk butter, cream, Parmesan, and black pepper into egg mixture and season with salt.
5. Remove asparagus and divide among four plates.
6. Divide the sauce, sprinkle with fresh cracked pepper, and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
